description_long: This object is an antique field cannon, featuring a long, cylindrical barrel mounted on a two-wheeled carriage. The barrel is adorned with subtle decorative rings and is supported by a robust, angular base with visible bolts and metal reinforcements. The carriage includes two large, spoked wheels made of metal, connected by an axle, and a pair of chains draped along the sides for added stability or towing. The rear section of the base is boxy and reinforced, with two prominent bolts and a chain attached, suggesting a mechanism for securing or maneuvering the cannon. The surface is finished in a weathered, tan color, giving it an aged, historical appearance. Metal fittings, such as brackets and chains, are visible throughout, contributing to the object's rugged and utilitarian design.
description: A weathered, antique field cannon with a long barrel, mounted on a two-wheeled metal carriage and reinforced with chains and bolts. The surface is tan and aged, with visible metal fittings and spoked wheels.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the cannon barrel, both large spoked wheels, and the chain details along the carriage.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the boxy reinforced base, two prominent bolts, and the chains attached to the back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the barrel, wheels, and carriage structure, mirroring the features seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the open muzzle of the cannon barrel and the alignment of the two spoked wheels.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One fixed cannon barrel mounted centrally on the carriage.
attribute_armor_plating: None visible; the structure is open with no additional armor plating.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; the surface is a solid, weathered tan color.
attribute_tire_type: Not applicable; the vehicle uses two large metal spoked wheels.
